buildings.description: Mines basic metals resources.
Mines rare materials.
Gathering deuterium.
Using most efficient Renewable energy sorces on planet. Utilising mass energy storage devices.
Good old nuclear power technology. Safe, steady and reliable.
Good old nuclear power technology. Safe, steady and reliable.
Planetary METAL storages.
Planetary CRYSTAL deposits.
Planetary DEUTERIUM tanks.
Main industry power.
Produces ships. If not busy, repair ships with half production speed.
Increases industry power.
Researches new technologies.
Repairs orbiting ships and provide deuterium supply for them.
Stores planetary bombs for future bombardment missions.
Creates new land.
Automatically detects incoming fleets in normal range. Detects incoming fleets to scanned planet in half range. Amount of scans per turn is sqrt(current level).
Makes possible to jump between systems. Every level increases Interstellar Trade Port capacity by 20%, and decreases its trade cost by 1%.
Makes possible to exchange resources in ratio 3:2:1 with 5-40% operational cost. Every level above 1 decreases op. cost by 1%.
Reduces enemy Attack plunder efficiency by its protection value. Base plunder starts at 80%.
